# kanidm_group_members (Resource)

Manages a subset of group memberships without taking ownership of the group's full member list.

Use this for built-in or externally managed groups where Terraform should only add/remove the listed members.

Do not use this resource against the same target group as `kanidm_group.members`; that overlap is unsupported.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) Target group identifier. May be a built-in group name, SPN, UUID, or a referenced `kanidm_group` ID.
- `members` (Set of String) Set of members this resource should ensure are present in the target group. Only this managed subset is added/removed.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Stable Kanidm UUID for the target group.
